installCommand: if [ -d knowledge-work-center ]; then cd knowledge-work-center; elif [ -d ../knowledge-work-center ]; then cd ../knowledge-work-center; fi; npm install
buildCommand: if [ -d knowledge-work-center ]; then cd knowledge-work-center; elif [ -d ../knowledge-work-center ]; then cd ../knowledge-work-center; fi; npm run build
devCommand: if [ -d knowledge-work-center ]; then cd knowledge-work-center; elif [ -d ../knowledge-work-center ]; then cd ../knowledge-work-center; fi; npm run dev
